name: ESCALADE INC
business: Escalade, Incorporated operates in one business segment: Sporting Goods, manufacturing, importing, and distributing sporting goods brands including basketball goals, archery, indoor and outdoor game recreation, and fitness products. The company sells through major sporting goods retailers, specialty dealers, key online retailers, direct-to-consumer e-commerce, traditional department stores, and mass merchants. Escalade owns brands such as Bear Archery, STIGA (licensed), Goalrilla, and Brunswick Billiards, among others.

exposures.sentence: Escalade Sports manufactures, imports, and distributes widely recognized sporting goods brands in basketball goals, archery, indoor and outdoor game recreation and fitness products through major sporting goods retailers, specialty dealers, key on-line retailers, direct-to-consumer e-commerce, traditional department stores and mass merchants.
Escalade Sports manufactures, imports, and distributes widely recognized sporting goods brands ... through ... key on-line retailers, direct-to-consumer e-commerce.
